label: Ideo description maker
description: Grammar configuration for generating a structure meme's ideology description. Required for structure memes; must define at least one pattern.

patterns.label: Patterns
patterns.description: Weighted list of IdeoStoryPatternDef entries. One is randomly selected when the ideology description is generated.

rules.label: Rules
rules.description: Inline grammar rules applied on top of the selected pattern when generating the description.

constants.label: Constants
constants.description: String constant values injected into the grammar rules by key name. Each child element name is the constant key; text content is the string value.
